# Test: Duplicate Tag Error Handling (Edge Case)
# Validates that tag conflict errors are handled gracefully.
#
# Prerequisites: k3d and Gitea running (handled by TestE2E)
# Environment: GITEA_URL, GITEA_TOKEN, E2E_CLUSTER are injected by test runner

# Step 1: Create app repository
mkdir app
cd app
exec git init
exec git config user.name 'E2E Test Bot'
exec git config user.email 'e2e@example.com'
exec apx init app --org=testorg --repo=test-app --non-interactive internal/apis/proto/tagtest/v1
exists apx.yaml

exec git add .
exec git commit -m 'Initial schema'
exec git tag proto/tagtest/v1/v1.0.0

# Step 2: Release prepare with v1.0.0 (dry-run)
exec apx release prepare proto/tagtest/v1 --canonical-repo=github.com/testorg/tag-test --version=v1.0.0 --dry-run
stdout 'Dry-run mode'

# Step 3: Try creating duplicate tag (git rejects this)
! exec git tag proto/tagtest/v1/v1.0.0
stderr 'already exists'

# Step 4: Try force overwriting the tag
exec git tag -f proto/tagtest/v1/v1.0.0
exec git tag -l 'proto/tagtest/v1/*'
stdout 'v1.0.0'

# Step 5: Create a new version tag succeeds
exec sh -c 'echo "// updated" >> internal/apis/proto/tagtest/v1/tagtest.proto'
exec git add .
exec git commit -m 'Update for v1.0.1'
exec git tag proto/tagtest/v1/v1.0.1

exec git tag -l 'proto/tagtest/v1/*'
stdout 'v1.0.0'
stdout 'v1.0.1'

# Step 6: Release prepare with new version succeeds
exec apx release prepare proto/tagtest/v1 --canonical-repo=github.com/testorg/tag-test --version=v1.0.1 --dry-run
stdout 'Dry-run mode'
stdout 'v1.0.1'

cd ..

# Success: Duplicate tag handling validated
# - Git rejects duplicate tag creation with clear error
# - Force-overwrite tags works
# - New version tags can be created alongside existing ones
# - Releasing with new version succeeds
